Off Calendar Nov-21-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Bridget K. Kaman, Esq. of THELEN REID & PRIEST LLP 371-1200 for Plaintiff/X-Defendant AMEC PLC moving party

THIS MATTER IS ALSO LINE NO. 08 on today's calendar. Counsel represented in open court that she spoke with opposing counsel Michael Mau who stated he had no opposition to a consolidation of this action with 317477 Morse Diesel International vs. 2nd St. Tower Association. Based on her representations, the Court GRANTED the motion to consolidate. Order signed in open court. Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
